title: pelargonium × haemanthon
intro: Pelargonium × haemanthon, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium roseum and Pelargonium capitatum. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote emotional balance and well-being.
